commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Missing external real behavior proof plus the protected maintainer label make this a maintainer-handled PR rather than an automated repair-lane task.; Cleared: The diff narrows a security-sensitive approval-resolution path and does not add dependencies, lifecycle hooks, CI changes, secrets handling, or new network destinations. (sha=c5cae502ae35fea1a52e356f9d0f1d526ad9bd69)
commands.review_summary:
The PR shares QQBot approval authorization in one helper, passes active config into interaction handling, gates native approval button callbacks by callback actor identity before resolving approvals, and adds focused unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main resolves parsed QQBot approval button callbacks directly through `resolveApproval` without the configured approver check. I did not run a live QQBot callback round trip in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Missing external real behavior proof plus the protected `maintainer` label make this a maintainer-handled PR rather than an automated repair-lane task.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
